method: Sourced, dated figures only. No fake live counters. Figures are category-specific and not interchangeable.

panels.title: Global Conflict Snapshot
panels.description: Conflict deaths, civilian casualties, wounded, and displacement must be pulled from UN/OHCHR/OCHA, courts, commissions, humanitarian agencies, and major wire services where primary data is unavailable.

panels.title: Global Displacement
panels.description: Refugees, asylum seekers, internally displaced people, and stateless populations should be kept separate.

panels.title: Famine / Food Insecurity
panels.description: IPC phases, famine warnings, acute food insecurity, siege conditions, and humanitarian access restrictions.

panels.title: Migration / Irregular Immigration
panels.description: Border encounters, irregular crossings, asylum applications, removals, returns, departures, missing migrants, overstays, and estimated unauthorized populations are separate categories.

panels.title: Vaccines: Damages & Compensation
panels.description: Adverse-event reports, compensated claims, pending claims, rejected claims, and causal findings must be separated.
panels.sourceLabel: HRSA VICP / CICP / UK VDPS / VAERS disclaimer

panels.title: Children / Exploitation
panels.description: Missing-child support cases, resolved cases, CyberTipline reports, online enticement, trafficking cases, and law-enforcement records must not be mixed.
